description_long: This rifle features a compact, bullpup configuration with a robust, angular frame and an integrated carrying handle that runs along the top. The body is primarily matte black with some dark olive green elements, giving it a tactical, modern appearance. The magazine is positioned behind the trigger, characteristic of bullpup designs, and the rifle includes a prominent trigger guard and pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The barrel is relatively short and partially shrouded, with a squared-off muzzle end that suggests a focus on close-quarters use. The stock is fixed and integrated into the rear of the frame, providing stability without extending far from the main body. Minimal external attachments are visible, and the sighting system appears to be a simple iron sight integrated into the carry handle.
description: A compact, bullpup-style rifle with a matte black and dark olive green finish, featuring an integrated carry handle and fixed stock. The design is modern and tactical, with a short barrel and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow muzzle, barrel shroud, and the alignment of the carry handle above the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bullpup configuration, integrated carry handle, fixed stock, and the position of the magazine behind the grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock, the symmetry of the frame, and the alignment of the handle and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the magazine, trigger guard, and overall compactness.
